items.title: Jaspal Rana, former Asian Games gold medallist, passes away at 49
items.summary: Jaspal Rana was conferred the Arjuna Award in 1994 and Padma Shri in 1997 for his contributions to Indian shooting. Jaspal Rana was awarded Dronacharya Award in 2020
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Holder, Joseph set up victory as West Indies go 1-0 up
items.summary: Sri Lanka scored just 147 and gave WI a scare, but Hope's 65* led the chase
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: 'There's a World Cup happening?' Are Americans excited about the tournament?
items.summary: With the World Cup under way, how excited are people across the United States - and do they even know it's on?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
